title: March 6th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - radical irony is the only path to authenticity because nothing is as it seems
            - existentialist realism as a necessary predicate to capitalist realism
            - in my [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] i want to give voice to the heavenly ambiguity that undergirds the schizophrenia of capitalist realism
            - togetherness can only be returned to in our modern era by a radical and brace of aloneness
            - people can't come together without first coming to
        - notes about companies
            - companies like niantic aren't good guys are nice guys. they use the right phrases and say the right words but at the end of the day they still expect you to put out when they feel like they press the right buttons and they're still punitive when you don't even if you don't want to. that's true for their employees and for their customers for their business p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ners
            - existentialism is a political ideology that has not been activated yet capitalist realism doesn't function without advertising advertising is the point of attack advertising psychology is the reason. pastiche and the flattening of history is the mode of operation. increasing of insecurity existential insecurity and the commodification of solutions directly correlates to advertising psychology. they're not consequences of capitalism it's the game plan
        - have so many great ideas lyrics
            - have so many bright ideas
            - i learned i couldn't keep em right here
            - and that's just the light years
            - never mind the dark matters
            - still don't know where they go when the p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]icles scatter
            - when i wave at em i'm just guessing
            - but the inevitable heat death means even that superstition (supposition/superposition)
            - a blessing
    - professional
